hero.description: Build a sustainable long-term asset through professionally managed vineyard investments.

investmentIntro.title: An Investment Model Growing with the Power of <gold>Land</gold>
investmentIntro.description: Vineyards are not only agricultural production areas. When managed correctly, they become real assets that can generate value across generations, provide resilience against inflation and offer genuine return potential.
investmentIntro.emphasis: We manage this value for you.
investmentIntro.imageAlt: Grape clusters ripening in warm sunlight

selection.title: Land Selection & Analysis
selection.description: We identify the most suitable vineyard investment opportunities by evaluating climate conditions, soil quality, and long-term growth potential.

acquisition.title: Acquisition & Title Deed Process
acquisition.description: We manage all legal procedures and complete the title deed transfer through a secure and transparent process.

management.title: Professional Vineyard Management
management.description: Our experienced team handles vineyard establishment, maintenance, production, and day-to-day operational management.

returns.title: Harvest & Returns
returns.description: We support the long-term growth of your investment through production income and land value appreciation.

featuredVineyard.title: Konya Bozkır Vineyard
featuredVineyard.description: Located in the high-altitude lands of Bozkır, our vineyard is positioned for quality production and long-term value growth with Sultaniye grapes grown in mineral-rich soils.
featuredVineyard.imageAlt: A vineyard in Konya Bozkır at sunset

respect.title: Respect for Land
respect.description: We protect the natural balance while enabling productive and sustainable cultivation.

management.title: Expert Management
management.description: Our experienced team manages the full operational process with discipline.

longTerm.title: Long-Term View
longTerm.description: We focus on investments that create value across generations, not short-term gains.

profitability.title: Is Vineyard Investment Profitable?
profitability.imageAlt: Grape clusters ripening in a vineyard

cta.title: Grow Your Future with <gold>Productive Land</gold>
cta.description: Let us evaluate a tailored investment model for you. Our expert team is ready to plan a vineyard investment aligned with your goals and expectations.
